creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Happened after last fusefs-kmod port update, previous fusefs-kmod-0.3.0_5 was built without problems

pkg_info | grep fuse
fusefs-kmod-0.3.0_5 Kernel module for fuse
fusefs-libs-2.7.0_1 FUSE allows filesystem implementation in userspace
fusefs-sshfs-1.8    Mount remote directories over ssh

--- fusefs-kmod.log begins here ---
===>  Found saved configuration for fusefs-kmod-0.2.19.6
===>  Extracting for fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1
=> MD5 Checksum OK for fuse4bsd-0.3.9-pre1.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for fuse4bsd-0.3.9-pre1.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1
===>   fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1 depends on package: fusefs-libs>2.4.1 - found
===>   fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1 depends on executable: deplate - found
===>  Configuring for fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1
===>  Building for fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1
===> fuse_module (all)
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /usr/work/usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod/work/fuse4bsd-0.3.9-pre1/fuse_module
@ -> /usr/src/sys
machine -> /usr/src/sys/i386/include
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -p
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -q
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -h
cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=pentium4 -march=pentium4 -DKERNCONFDIR="\"/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/HADES\"" -Werror -D_KERNEL -DKLD_MODULE -nostdinc -I-  -I../include -I/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/HADES -I. -I@ -I@/contrib/altq -I@/../include -I/usr/include -finline-limit=8000 -fno-common  -mno-align-long-strings -mpreferred-stack-boundary=2  -mno-mmx -mno-3dnow -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -ffreestanding -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes  -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual  -fformat-extensions -std=c99 -c fuse_main.c
In file included from fuse_main.c:5:
./config.h:2:24: opt_global.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/work/usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod/work/fuse4bsd-0.3.9-pre1/fuse_module.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/work/usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod/work/fuse4bsd-0.3.9-pre1.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod.
--- fusefs-kmod.log ends here ---

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod && make
